results.prompt: IMAGE 1 is both STRUCTURE and IDENTITY and wins every conflict. Apply one finishing delta only: improve material integration and premium photographic cohesion. Refine feather micro-contrast, translucent chromatic tile surfaces, one coherent right-side rim light, subtle atmospheric depth and controlled near-to-far falloff. Preserve exactly one hummingbird, its exact pose, scale, coordinates, complete anatomy, silhouette, right-facing beak, wing geometry and tail. Preserve the left 46 percent as a calm dark low-detail copy field and keep all bright fragments outside it. Keep the deep navy palette and the same tile-wake trajectory. LOCK EVERYTHING ELSE. No text, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, UI, frame, second bird, cloned body, extra wing, detached feather, new object, heavy glow, plastic smoothing or crop change.
